Application.Name: TeamViewer ID Import v1.01
Application.Description:
Synchronizes TeamViewer IDs to Alvao computer objects.
Matching logic: - Alvao Hostname: NBPLN080 or NBPLN080.domain.local - TeamViewer name: NBPLN080 - Faro - Normalized match key: NBPLN080
Recommended rollout: 1. Fill ApiToken. 2. Keep DryRun=true. 3. Review Diagnostic Log. 4. Set DryRun=false.

Script.Name: Settings
TeamViewerImportPeriodicAction
